title: Return (error code) of xCurrentTime is always ignored
key_bug_features: Ignoring return value of xCurrentTime function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, name, strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', created_at) AS formatted_date FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = 1;
